dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses previous period return (negative) as the primary entry factor for mean reversion. Translated using 'returns' indicator which captures period-over-period price change. Exit condition uses reversal logic (positive returns) as author provided no specific exit threshold. Mean reversion typically occurs in ranging/non-trending markets, so target_regime set to RANGING. Note: 'half_life', 'threshold', and backtest parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source were not translatable to specific rule conditions.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal uses previous period return (negative) as the primary entry factor for mean reversion. Translated using 'returns' indicator which captures period-over-period price change. Exit condition uses reversal logic (positive returns) as author provided no specific exit threshold. Mean reversion typically occurs in ranging/non-trending markets, so target_regime set to RANGING. Note: 'half_life', 'threshold', and backtest parameters marked AUTHOR_SILENT in source were not translatable to specific rule conditions.

source_rule_text: Trade stocks exhibiting mean reversion by taking long positions when previous period returns are negative, betting on price recovery.
